title: Megumin
description: A simple resource pack that adds the ability to change the appearance of the sword and hat
body:
# For correct work you need Optifine or CITResewn

# Set 
In this texturpack there is a hat and a staff of the character
- [Full set](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oqHel6gn/images/f95d1713b685b16e596107036339f799947c669a.png)
![Full set](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oqHel6gn/images/f95d1713b685b16e596107036339f799947c669a.png)

# Hat
 Rename carved pumpkin
(carved_pumpkin): magic hat


# Sword
 Rename your sword "magic staff"
(any sword): magic staff
